violations.description: Demonstration of conformance with variance. — --License holder did not demonstrate conformance with approved variance or HACCP procedures. -Logs are not being used for current HACCP plan for vacuum sealed (raw) products. *Chef will need be familiar with current HACCP plan and utilize the appropriate logs.
Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. -Raw "Not for Sale" Ground beef in bottom of refrigerator. *Removed immediately-staff stated it was not for use in kitchen.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Jar of asparagus made in-house was not date marked.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Cauliflower sauce was dated 6/27. -Vegan meatballs in backroom refrigerator were dated more than a month ago.
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
